# E Multitech Solution Pvt. Ltd.

> Custom software, SaaS, AI, and mobile development partner building software continuously since 2010. Headquartered in Kathmandu, Nepal with a presence in Melbourne, Australia. Serving clients globally since 2010.

Use this file to discover the site's structure and the canonical URL for each page. Each link below points to the production page on https://www.emultitechsolution.com.

## Company

- [Custom Software, SaaS & AI Partner](https://www.emultitechsolution.com/): Founder-led software engineering since 2010. hundreds of projects delivered worldwide — central-bank systems, European SaaS, marketplaces at scale.
- [About — Software Engineering Since 2010](https://www.emultitechsolution.com/about.html): Software engineering and digital product company established in Kathmandu in 2010 — AI-native engineering, auction expertise and platforms built to last.
- [Book a Strategy Call](https://www.emultitechsolution.com/contact.html): Book a free strategy call with the E Multitech engineering team. Pick a date and time slot — we confirm within 24 hours, no auto-responders.
- [Get a Free Project Consultation](https://www.emultitechsolution.com/request_quote.html): Request a free project consultation. Tell us about your project, pick a discovery call slot, and get a response within 48 hours.
- [Case Studies — Software We Shipped](https://www.emultitechsolution.com/case-studies.html): Real-world case studies from E Multitech: SaaS, AI, fintech, healthcare, auction platforms, and enterprise systems deployed for clients across 4 continents.
- [Our Team — Engineering & Leadership](https://www.emultitechsolution.com/team.html): Meet the team behind hundreds of projects. Founder-led in-house engineering in Kathmandu since October 2010, APAC partner in Melbourne. No subcontractors.
- [Security & Compliance Posture](https://www.emultitechsolution.com/security.html): Our security architecture, compliance posture & due-diligence summary — HIPAA-aligned, BAA available, multi-tenant isolation. For US & EU clients.

## Services

- [Custom Software Development Services](https://www.emultitechsolution.com/custom-software-development.html): Custom software built for production load since 2010. Litigation system for Nepal Rastra Bank, EU procurement SaaS, hundreds of projects delivered worldwide.
- [SaaS Product Development Services](https://www.emultitechsolution.com/saas-development.html): Multi-tenant SaaS built to survive years in production. DiNePa: 99.4% uptime over 5+ years, sub-500ms latency for EU enterprise procurement.
- [Mobile App Development Services](https://www.emultitechsolution.com/mobile-development.html): iOS, Android, Flutter & React Native apps for marketplaces, logistics & healthcare EVV. Upkeep.pro: 500K+ daily appointments for 10K+ pros worldwide.
- [AI Solutions & Agentic Automation](https://www.emultitechsolution.com/ai-powered-solutions.html): AI engineered into production systems — document intelligence, voice-to-text, risk detection, predictive ops. Built for regulated industries since 2010.
- [DevOps & Cloud Engineering](https://www.emultitechsolution.com/devops-engineer.html): Cloud, CI/CD, Kubernetes, IaC & SRE. DiNePa: 99.4% uptime over 5+ years. NRB: central-bank-grade intranet deployment. Founder-led since 2010.
- [Product Engineering Services](https://www.emultitechsolution.com/product-engineering.html): End-to-end product engineering — discovery, design, build, ship, scale. For founders without a CTO. hundreds of projects across four verticals.
- [Software Development Services](https://www.emultitechsolution.com/software-development.html): Secure, scalable, high-performance software that streamlines operations and elevates user experience. Web, mobile, SaaS, and enterprise systems.
- [Healthcare SaaS Development Services](https://www.emultitechsolution.com/healthcare-saas-development.html): HIPAA-architected healthcare SaaS for US home care, EVV & AI document intelligence. Founder-led since 2010 · in-house engineering team.
- [Auction Software Development Services](https://www.emultitechsolution.com/auction-software.html): Penny, reverse, unique-bid, Dutch, price-reveal & eBay-style auction software, built since 2010 for operators across the US, UK, EU, Asia & Australia.
- [Banking & Fintech Software Development](https://www.emultitechsolution.com/banking-fintech-software-development.html): Central-bank-grade software: case tracking, audit logs, document management & regulatory workflow. Anchored by the Nepal Rastra Bank litigation system.

## Industries

- [Industries We Ship Production Software For](https://www.emultitechsolution.com/industries.html): Healthcare, banking, procurement, real estate, marketplaces & IoT — every vertical anchored by a named production case study. Building since 2010.
- [Healthcare Software Development](https://www.emultitechsolution.com/healthcare.html): EHR, telehealth, clinical workflow, and hospital management software — engineered with HIPAA-architected isolation. Anchored by Adult Home Care SaaS case study.
- [Real Estate Software Development](https://www.emultitechsolution.com/realestate.html): Property marketplaces, multi-class listings, MLS/IDX integrations, agent CMS & mortgage-ready lead capture. Anchored by MSG Homes, live in the Philippines.

## Auction software products

- [Penny Auction Software (Live Bidding)](https://www.emultitechsolution.com/penny-live-auction-script-software.html): Live penny auction software with bid extensions, bidding fees, auto-bid, and full operator controls. Deployed for clients across the US, UK, and EU since 2010.
- [Highest Unique Bid Auction Script](https://www.emultitechsolution.com/highest-unique-bids-auction-script-online-highest-bid-software-services.html): Highest Unique Bid auction software — secure scripts, full customization & proven deployments. Built for global auction operators since 2010.
- [Lowest Unique Bid Auction Script](https://www.emultitechsolution.com/lowest-unique-bid-auction-script-online-software-reverse-auction-low-bid.html): Customizable Lowest Unique Bid auction software for global operators. Reverse auction logic, secure scripts, and full operator control panel.
- [Price Reveal Auction Script](https://www.emultitechsolution.com/price-reveal-auction-script-express-auction-software-live-unique-bidding-system.html): Customized Price Reveal Auction scripts — hand-crafted, fully featured, and built on the latest stack. Proven across South-East Asia and global operators.
- [eBay-Style Marketplace Auction Script](https://www.emultitechsolution.com/ebay-auction-like-ebay-script.html): eBay-style marketplace auction script — 100% open-source, ready-built, fully customizable. Supports single and multi-seller marketplaces with one admin panel.

## Client showcases

- [AuctionCents — US Penny Auction](https://www.emultitechsolution.com/auctioncents.html): AuctionCents is a leading US penny auction platform built by E Multitech: membership tiers, auto-bid, master auto-bid, 24h, free, and bonus auctions.
- [BidBid.co.uk — Penny Auction Software](https://www.emultitechsolution.com/bidbid.html): BidBid.co.uk: a robust penny auction platform built with Node.js, PHP, MySQL, and jQuery. Auto-bid, CSV product upload, bonus auctions, 24h auctions.
- [Bienbid — French Penny Auction](https://www.emultitechsolution.com/bienbid.html): Bienbid: a multilingual penny auction website with full French language support, a pre-bid booking system, auto-bid, and a flexible operator feature set.
- [EodBox — Unique Bid Auction Platform](https://www.emultitechsolution.com/eodbox.html): EodBox: a Unique Bid auction with two-decimal-place bids, multi-currency, multi-language, PayTM / CCAvenue / PayPal, and push notifications, built on MVC.
- [OnlineAlku — B2B Reverse Auction](https://www.emultitechsolution.com/onlinealku.html): OnlineAlku is a multi-seller, multi-buyer B2B reverse auction platform. Tender-style procurement where buyers post needs and suppliers compete with live quotes.
- [PigeonOnNet — Live Video Auction](https://www.emultitechsolution.com/pigeononnet.html): PigeonOnNet: a Dutch-style auction platform with live video streaming and simulcast for selling pigeons, plus forward and price-reveal auction support.
- [Rubids — Live Auction Marketplace](https://www.emultitechsolution.com/rubids.html): Rubids is a live auction marketplace with daily auctions across many categories — iOS, Android, and web — with coupons, games, and earning opportunities.
- [SMG Bids — Lowest Unique Bid (UK)](https://www.emultitechsolution.com/smgbids.html): SMG Bids: a Lowest Unique Bid auction platform built for a UK client. Smartphone-ready, fast, with a user-friendly operator control panel.
- [uBiduBuy.sg — Low Bid + Reveal](https://www.emultitechsolution.com/ubidbuy.html): uBiduBuy: a Singapore-based luxury auction marketplace combining Lowest Unique Bid and Price Reveal formats with credit refund options for participants.

## Case studies

- [SaaS EHR Case Study — Multi-Hospital](https://www.emultitechsolution.com/case-studies-detail.html): How we built a SaaS EHR for a US healthcare institution: 25% better regulatory compliance and 50% faster access to patient records.
- [DiNePa — Digital Negotiation SaaS](https://www.emultitechsolution.com/dinepa-case-study.html): How E Multitech built DiNePa: a multi-tenant real-time digital negotiation platform for European enterprise procurement. Reverse, forward & hybrid bidding.
- [Litigation System — Nepal Rastra Bank](https://www.emultitechsolution.com/litigation-management-system-nepal-rastra-bank.html): Enterprise legal workflow platform built for Nepal Rastra Bank — central-bank-grade compliance, case tracking, document management, and audit logs.
- [AI-Powered Home Care SaaS — HIPAA Build](https://www.emultitechsolution.com/adult-home-care-saas-case-study.html): AI-powered, HIPAA-architected home-care SaaS for a US operator — document intelligence, voice-to-text notes, predictive scheduling & risk detection.
- [Upkeep.pro Marketplace App Case Study](https://www.emultitechsolution.com/upkeep-service-booking-case-study.html): How E Multitech built Upkeep.pro: dual-sided iOS, Android & web service-booking marketplace doing 500K+ daily appointments for 10K+ professionals worldwide.
- [MSG Homes — Real Estate Marketplace](https://www.emultitechsolution.com/msg-homes-realty-case-study.html): How we built msg-homes.com for My Saving Grace Realty — multi-region real estate marketplace covering 6 property types across the Philippines, bank-integrated.

## Portfolio & social proof

- [Our Portfolio of Software Projects](https://www.emultitechsolution.com/works.html): Portfolio of web, mobile, SaaS, AI & auction platforms — hundreds of projects delivered worldwide, founder-led and built in-house since 2010.
- [Client Testimonials](https://www.emultitechsolution.com/testimonial-all.html): What our clients say about working with E Multitech Solution — from US-based founders to enterprise project leads across Europe and Asia.

## Blog

- [Engineering Blog — SaaS & AI](https://www.emultitechsolution.com/blog.html): Engineering insights on custom software, SaaS, AI, and product strategy from the E Multitech team. Articles for founders, CTOs, and product leaders.
- [Crypto Exchange Fees in Australia](https://www.emultitechsolution.com/blog-detail.html): Understand how Australian crypto exchange fees work, what to look out for, and how to choose the right exchange. A comprehensive guide for Aussie traders.
